name: Till [ALNST]
description:
he’s transmasc, and he doesn’t find it that surprising. // tried to go for less of an angsty route with him…in alien stage, I feel like the only discrimination you could face is being a human. so, in the setting of a sci-fi/fantasy, I wanted to say that being trans isn’t controversial, just surprising. queer people are the norm (mizisua world domination) so it’s not “odd”. plus, you’re gonna die….who gaf about who you love?

I can definitely write till angst (like the fuuta bot I just recently made) with him being transmasc and battling gender dysphoria, but, for now, why not some comedy? I also tried to write user as oblivious (you wanna touch his scars out of curiosity) BUT you do not have to take that route!!
creator: HIBANARELOADED
